content: خُصوصاً في الظُروف الحالية لازم تاخد بالك من استهلاك المياه
translations: eng:especially in the current circumstances you have to take care with water consumption

transcriptions.arabizi: chusoosan fiilzuroof ilhalya laezim taechud baelak min 'istihlaek ilmayaeh
